text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Manhattan Cafe clutching her
head in the hallway.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I'm fine. I just have a headache.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um... Would you mind accompanying me for a
while?
choice_data_list: I mean, I'd be happy to...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's just that when I get headaches, they start to get rowdy...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't want anything to happen to you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's touching that she cares about me, but I'm
more worried about her headache than my
well-being...
